description: Hello everyone!! Hope everyone is having a great holiday season. With the new year coming quick we wanted to update everyone on a few things we will be implementing come January 1st. Due to increase in everyday costs we will be increasing our day to day prices. Starting day of drop off: 1 dog in a kennel will be $25 2 dogs in a kennel will be $40 If you book into the new year from now until January 1st we will still accept our current pricing. Due to our child being involved in activities we will also be sticking to our hours of operation for drop off and pickups, meaning there will be no outside drop off or pickups. Please plan accordingly. Our hours are 8-11am and 4-7pm. Thank you, Northland Dog Boarding

layoutDescription: Diagonal or angled section dividers (clip-path or skewed bands); hero with angled color block behind headline; dynamic but not chaotic.
mood: Friendly, caring, trustworthy — pets are family
antiPatterns: No menu section. No restaurant language. Soft or playful but not childish unless posts suggest it.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
